overall.description: A cinematic game engine shot from a third-person perspective showing a character sitting on a rocky outcrop overlooking a vast prairie landscape with distant mountains and scattered forests. The scene is completely static with bright midday lighting, featuring a brief moment where the character raises their arm in a drinking gesture while birds fly through the sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky overlook on prairie cliff edge

events.description: character raises right arm to mouth in a drinking gesture, then lowers it

agents.ego_description: sitting on the edge of a rocky outcrop overlooking the vast landscape, occasionally shifting posture

notable_agents.action: birds flying across the sky in the distance

entered.detail: large gray stone cliff edge where the character is seated, with rough textured surface
hazy blue mountain range visible on the horizon beneath scattered clouds
dense dark green trees covering the rolling hills in the mid-ground
expansive grassland with varying shades of green stretching toward the mountains

segments.scene_description: The segment presents a static, contemplative view from a rocky cliff overlooking a vast prairie landscape. The character sits motionless on the stone outcrop facing distant mountains and rolling forested hills under a bright blue sky. Birds occasionally fly across the sky in the distance. Approximately two-thirds through the segment, the character briefly raises their arm in a drinking gesture before returning to a resting position.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, contemplative perspective from a rocky cliff overlooking a vast and serene prairie landscape. It begins with a wide view of a character sitting motionless on a stone outcrop, facing distant mountains and rolling forested hills under a bright blue sky. As the scene lingers, birds occasionally drift across the horizon, adding a sense of life to the stillness of the environment. The composition then shifts slightly in focus as the character briefly raises their arm in a drinking gesture before returning to a resting position. Finally, the camera remains fixed on the expansive vista, capturing the quiet harmony between the figure and the midday wilderness.
